faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but rentals are typically available at most golf simulation venues.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink may be restricted, but most venues offer on-site dining and beverage options.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: 18 holes usually take about 1-2 hours depending on the simulator setup and player pace.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Many golf simulation venues welcome families, but it's best to check specific age requirements and policies.
